name: Name
productNotAvailableError: Product not available in the following subscription plan(s): {subscriptionPlan}.
customerProfileNotSelected: Please select a customer profile to add the product {trigram}
subscriptionPlanNotChecked: Please check a subscription plan to add the product {trigram}
productWrongTypeError: This product is not allowed in offers of type {customerProfile}
urlEmptyBeforeSaveError: Please enter an URL before saving.
repartitionKeysError: Reparitions keys are not valid. Please enter new reparitions keys.
deactivateWarning: The deactivation of an offer will make it unavailable for new sales and for renewals. The offer can be activated again if needed and if the end date is not reached. Do you confirm the deactivation of this offer ?
offerMigrationNotice: Select the target offer. Notice that : The target Offer URL will be replaced by the source Offer URL and the source offer end date will be set to yesterday (so it becomes not purchasable anymore)
targetOfferHasRenewWithInfo: If your target offer has a "renewWith", then it will replace the current "renewWith" of your source offer
targetOfferDoesNotHaveRenewWithInfo: If your target offer does not have a "renewWith", then the target offer will replace the current "renewWith" of your source offer
ProductDiscontinuedInfo: This product is discontinued and not available anymore. Please migrate the current offer to a new one.
CreditPackProductsError: Only products of type Credit Pack are authorized if offer is of type Credit Pack
invalidTypeError: Offer of type {offerType} cannot be associated to Customer Profile : {customerProfile}
wrongPeriodicitiesError: Subscription plans must be compliant with product's periodicities
